# אקסלנס טרייד — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Excellence Trade (Xnes) is a leading Israeli self-directed trading platform under the Excellence brand. The landing page is designed to guide new users through the account registration and opening process for self-directed trading. The design should align with the existing xnes.co.il website, using the official Excellence brand colors and visual identity — conveying trust, professionalism, and financial expertise typical of a regulated Israeli brokerage.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About אקסלנס טרייד
Excellence Trade (Xnes) is a leading Israeli self-directed trading platform under the Excellence brand. The landing page is designed to guide new users through the account registration and opening process for self-directed trading. The design should align with the existing xnes.co.il website, using the official Excellence brand colors and visual identity — conveying trust, professionalism, and financial expertise typical of a regulated Israeli brokerage.

## Target Audience
משקיעים פרטיים המעוניינים לפתוח חשבון מסחר עצמאי

## Industry
שוק ההון / מסחר עצמאי / פיננסים
